title: Backlite Skill Agent status.json
description: Status payload written by a skill-based agent at /home/agent/workspace/status.json after the harness exits. The orchestrator reads this file to drive task lifecycle transitions and webhook events.

exit_code.description: Effective exit code reported by the agent. 0 = success.

complete.description: True when the agent considers the task done. Overrides exit_code in the orchestrator's success determination.

needs_input.description: True when the agent stopped because it needs more input from the user.

question.description: Free-form prompt for the user when needs_input is true.

error.description: Diagnostic error message when the agent failed (complete=false, needs_input=false).

pr_url.description: URL of the pull request created by a code-mode task.

cost_usd.description: Dollar cost spent on the harness run. Notarized by the entrypoint from the harness stream-json output.

repo_url.description: GitHub repository URL the agent identified from the prompt.

url.description: Read mode: the URL that was summarized.

tldr.description: Read mode: short summary (<= 280 chars by convention).
